$comment: Soft dependencies for ticket-resolver. Claude Code has NO native plugin-dependency field, so this list drives a SessionStart soft-check (hooks/check-recommended-plugins.js) that only WARNS — it never blocks /resolve. Edit this file to add/remove/retune recommendations; the hook reads it at runtime, no code change needed.

recommended.label: caveman
recommended.why: Compresses orchestrator/subagent output ~75% — keeps the long multi-phase /resolve run inside the context window.

recommended.label: graphify
recommended.why: Builds a knowledge graph of the target repo so ticket-analyzer can query architecture/relationships instead of blind grep — faster, better-grounded root-cause analysis.
recommended.install: Install the graphify skill/CLI (~/.claude/skills/graphify), then run `graphify .` in the target repo.

recommended.label: superpowers
recommended.why: Provides the brainstorming / TDD / systematic-debugging / verification skills the implement & verify phases lean on for disciplined, evidence-based fixes.
